title: Terminal Bas & Teksi Bukit Gambir serves as main hub
snippet: The Terminal Bas & Teksi Bukit Gambir is the primary hub for regional travel in Bukit Gambir, offering essential connections for the local community.

title: Express buses connect Bukit Gambir to KL and JB
snippet: Bukit Gambir is connected to major hubs like Terminal Bersepadu Selatan (TBS) in Kuala Lumpur and Larkin Sentral in Johor Bahru via direct express bus services.

title: Limited local public transport options in Bukit Gambir
snippet: Within Bukit Gambir town, local public transport options are very limited, with most residents and visitors relying on taxis or private vehicles for flexibility.
